subcodes.first_line: In this day doth the Book proclaim among the factions: "The All-Bestowing hath come!" This is the Day of bounty and mercy and grace, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کتاب مابین احزاب بقد اتی الوهاب ناطق یوم یوم عنایت و رحمت و کرمست ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @oneness; unity of religion, @chastisement and requital, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
